product_overview: Yellow Airline is a lightweight web app to search flights, register and authenticate VIP users, create authenticated bookings with passenger breakdowns, and review personal reservations. The MVP focuses on simple discovery-to-booking flows and a VIP registration/login surface.
core_goals: Enable quick flight discovery by origin and destination and present results ordered by departure date.
Support simple user registration and authentication with JWT-based sessions stored client-side.
Allow authenticated users to create bookings with adult/child/infant counts while enforcing duplicate and capacity rules.
Provide a personal bookings view for users to review their confirmed reservations.
Offer a bilingual interface (English/Spanish) and an accessible VIP signup experience.

features.name: Flight Search And Listing
features.description: Browse available flights and filter results by origin and destination from the home page; results are ordered by departure date and handle empty or error states.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type an origin value -> Type a destination value -> Wait for loading state to finish -> Review the list of returned flight cards
Navigate to / -> Type an origin value -> Type a destination value -> Wait for loading state to finish -> See empty state message when no flights match the filters
Navigate to / -> Type an origin value -> Type a destination value -> Wait for loading state to finish -> See a network or fetch error when the backend is unavailable

features.name: VIP Registration
features.description: New users can request VIP access by submitting name, email, passport and password; the UI shows validation errors or redirects to login on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /vip -> Fill valid name, email, passport, and password values -> Submit the registration form -> See success and navigate to /login
Navigate to /vip -> Fill invalid or incomplete registration values -> Submit the registration form -> See validation error messages for the invalid fields
Navigate to /vip -> Fill valid values using an email already registered -> Submit the registration form -> See duplicate email error message

features.name: VIP Login
features.description: Existing VIP users authenticate by email and password; successful login stores a token locally and routes the user to the app, while failures surface clear error toasts.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password -> Submit the login form -> Receive and store JWT locally and navigate to /
Navigate to /login -> Fill incorrect email or password -> Submit the login form -> See an error toast indicating invalid credentials

features.name: Flight Booking
features.description: Authenticated users can reserve a flight from the home page by specifying adults, children and infants; the system prevents duplicate bookings and rejects requests exceeding available seats.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Ensure flights are visible -> Adjust passenger counts for adults, children, or infants -> Select a flight to reserve -> Submit the booking request while authenticated -> See confirmation success and booking persisted

Navigate to / -> Ensure flights are visible -> Adjust passenger counts for adults, children, or infants -> Select a flight to reserve -> Submit the booking request while unauthenticated -> See a login-required error and prevent booking

Navigate to / -> Ensure flights are visible -> Adjust passenger counts to exceed available seats -> Select a flight to reserve -> Submit the booking request while authenticated -> See an error indicating insufficient seats

features.name: My Bookings View
features.description: Authenticated users can view their previously created bookings; the page loads the user's bookings and shows an appropriate empty state or errors if requests fail.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password -> Submit the login form -> Receive and store JWT locally -> Navigate to /my-bookings -> Wait for bookings list to load -> Review booked flights
Navigate to /my-bookings without authentication -> Wait for bookings request -> See an authentication error or inconsistent empty state due to missing token

features.name: Language Toggle
features.description: Users can switch the UI language between Spanish and English via the navbar; labels update to the selected language across the interface.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle the language to Spanish or English -> Confirm translated labels update across the interface
Navigate to / -> Toggle the language to Spanish or English -> Observe mixed-language labels when copy is inconsistent between translations

routes.description: Home page that lists flights and lets users filter by origin and destination.
VIP registration page with a membership signup form.
Login page for existing VIP users.
Logged-in user page that lists their bookings.

features.name: Flight Search And Listing
features.description: Users can browse available flights and filter results by origin and destination from the home page.
user_interactions: Open the home page.
Type an origin in the first search input.
Type a destination in the second search input.
Wait for loading state to finish.
Review the list of returned flight cards or the empty state message.

features.name: VIP Registration
features.description: New users can request VIP access by completing the signup form with personal and credential data.
user_interactions: Open the VIP page.
Fill name, email, passport, and password fields.
Submit the VIP registration form.
See validation errors for invalid inputs or a success flow that redirects to login.

features.name: VIP Login
features.description: Existing VIP users can authenticate and store their token in localStorage.
user_interactions: Open the login page.
Fill email and password.
Submit the login form.
See an error toast on invalid credentials or navigate to home on success.

features.name: Flight Booking
features.description: Logged-in users can choose passenger counts and reserve a flight from the home page.
user_interactions: Open the home page with flights visible.
Adjust passenger counts for adults, children, or infants.
Click the booking button on a flight card.
See a login-required error when unauthenticated or a success/error toast when authenticated.

features.name: My Bookings View
features.description: Logged-in users can open their bookings page and review previously created reservations.
user_interactions: Login as a VIP user.
Open the My Bookings link from the navbar.
Wait for the bookings list to load.
Review booked flights or the empty state.

features.name: Language Toggle
features.description: Users can switch the UI language between Spanish and English from the navbar.
user_interactions: Open any page with the navbar.
Click the language toggle button.
Confirm translated labels update in the interface.

known_limitations.issue: Frontend API URLs are hardcoded to http://localhost:5000, so frontend tests depend on the backend being up and seeded.
known_limitations.impact: UI flows that fetch flights, register users, login, or create bookings will fail without the backend.

known_limitations.issue: The bookings page requests data even when no token exists and has no route guard.
known_limitations.impact: Unauthenticated access may show an error or inconsistent empty state instead of redirecting to login.

known_limitations.issue: Passenger selector only enforces per-field bounds and minimum one adult, not an explicit total-passenger cap across all groups.
known_limitations.impact: Tests around upper passenger limits may expose invalid combinations that the UI currently allows.
